description: Multi-exercise scoring schemes carried on a Block (§5.4). Spec canon: amrap, for_time, emom, tabata, rounds. Extended here with send_off/interval — the send-off-clock model swimmers, rowers and runners actually use, which the spec's rest-duration field and emom/tabata don't name (METHODOLOGY-VALIDATION G3).

tokens.label: For Time
tokens.description: Complete the prescribed work as fast as possible (timeCapSec is the ceiling).

tokens.label: EMOM
tokens.description: Start a fixed work parcel each intervalSec (minute = 60); rest is the remainder.

tokens.label: Tabata
tokens.description: Interval protocol, classically 20 s work / 10 s rest × 8 (workSec/restSec/rounds).

tokens.label: Rounds
tokens.description: A fixed number of rounds of the children.

tokens.label: Send-off Interval
tokens.description: Each rep departs on a fixed send-off (e.g. 10×100 m 'on 1:30'); rest is send-off minus work time, not a fixed rest. Carry the send-off in intervalSec.

tokens.label: Interval
tokens.description: Generic structured work/rest intervals where no more specific scheme fits (workSec/restSec/rounds).
